rows.source_ref: rockzz, "Your EA v3 - Daily Low & High Strategy", ForexFactory thread 1233107 (2023), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/1233107/your-ea-v3-daily-low-high (source .mq4/.ex4 attached in first post; strategy rules restated in posts #24 and #55/kai.cao)
rows.concept: On the new daily candle, trade a breakout of the previous day's high or low, choosing direction by the longer of the previous candle's two wicks (open-to-low vs high-to-open).
rows.eligibility_reason: Deterministic pure-MQL5 daily pending-stop breakout with SL/TP in pips; no ML/external data; FX-major+cross data on .DWX; SL+TP make it FTMO/DXZ compatible.
rows.notes: Rules: wickBuy = prevOpen - prevLow (lower shadow), wickSell = prevHigh - prevOpen (upper shadow). If wickBuy>wickSell place BuyStop at prevHigh + PipsAboveHigh (SL prevHigh - StopLossPips); if wickSell>wickBuy place SellStop at prevLow - PipsBelowLow (SL prevLow + StopLossPips). TP=TakeProfitPips. Suggested defaults TP=100 SL=30 (~1:3 R:R); emmanuel7788 argues min 1:2. Caveats lowering priority: EA is ChatGPT-generated, OP admits it 'hits stop loss everytime' in live and warns tester results diverge; backtests were control-point not every-tick (ramobomb), skeptics flag overfit/low-winrate (AleksDark) and 'results can't be legit' (ghwatson19); tienphuc2910 disputes wick logic for bull/bear candles. Variants: v3.1 (Cunpa) adds ATR-scaled variable exits and fixes a +2pip offset bug in SL calc; kai.cao requested delete-unfilled-pending-after-1-day and close-at-daily-candle-close TP options. Also demoed on US30 CFD (Indices) by driven18, so applicable beyond FX. Sunday/Friday-candle handling matters (Erebus/emmanuel7788 note different results with/without the small Sunday candle).
